revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Module:LoadData]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Module:LoadData]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: hopefully last batch of imports
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Module:LoadData]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Module:LoadData]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: remove deleted category New automatic wikipedia redirects

Protected "[[Module:LoadData]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 398 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite))
revision.text:
local p = {}
-- Finds the next key key <= or >= the given i. -- operator is ±1 local function findItemRange(data, i, operator) local bestIndex = nil i = i * operator for k, v in pairs(data) do local kop = type(k) == 'number' and k * operator if kop and kop <= i and (bestIndex == nil or kop > bestIndex * operator) then bestIndex = k end end if bestIndex then return data[bestIndex] else return nil end end
local function load(datamodule, frame) local args = frame.args local data = mw.loadData(datamodule) for i = 1, 20 do if args[i] then data = data[tonumber(args[i]) or args[i]] elseif args[i .. ' lteq'] then data = findItemRange(data, tonumber(args[i .. ' lteq']), 1) elseif args[i .. ' gteq'] then data = findItemRange(data, tonumber(args[i .. ' gteq']), -1) else break end end
if data == nil then return args['if_nil'] -- not a required argument, OK to return nil here. end
if type(data) == 'table' then -- Put the table into another table because the return value of loadData -- is a "fake" table that only has certain metamethods. local realdata = {} for k, v in pairs(data) do realdata[k] = v end data = realdata else data = { data } end
if args['template'] then return mw.text.unstripNoWiki(args['template']):format(unpack(data)) elseif args['preprocess'] then return frame:preprocess(mw.text.unstripNoWiki(args['preprocess']):format(unpack(data))) else return table.concat(data) end end
return setmetatable({}, { __index = function(t, k) return function(frame) return load('Module:' .. k, frame) end end })

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: reimporting these to fix older errors
revision.text:
local p = {}
-- Finds the next key key <= or >= the given i. -- operator is ±1 local function findItemRange(data, i, operator) local bestIndex = nil i = i * operator for k, v in pairs(data) do local kop = type(k) == 'number' and k * operator if kop and kop <= i and (bestIndex == nil or kop > bestIndex * operator) then bestIndex = k end end if bestIndex then return data[bestIndex] else return nil end end
local function load(datamodule, frame) local args = frame.args local data = mw.loadData(datamodule) for i = 1, 20 do if args[i] then data = data[tonumber(args[i]) or args[i]] elseif args[i .. ' lteq'] then data = findItemRange(data, tonumber(args[i .. ' lteq']), 1) elseif args[i .. ' gteq'] then data = findItemRange(data, tonumber(args[i .. ' gteq']), -1) else break end end
if data == nil then return args['if_nil'] -- not a required argument, OK to return nil here. end
if type(data) == 'table' then -- Put the table into another table because the return value of loadData -- is a "fake" table that only has certain metamethods. local realdata = {} for k, v in pairs(data) do realdata[k] = v end data = realdata else data = { data } end
if args['template'] then return mw.text.unstripNoWiki(args['template']):format(unpack(data)) elseif args['preprocess'] then return frame:preprocess(mw.text.unstripNoWiki(args['preprocess']):format(unpack(data))) else return table.concat(data) end end
return setmetatable({}, { __index = function(t, k) return function(frame) return load('Module:' .. k, frame) end end })

revision.comment: Protected "[[Module:LoadData]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 398 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite))
revision.text:
local p = {}
-- Finds the next key key <= or >= the given i. -- operator is ±1 local function findItemRange(data, i, operator) local bestIndex = nil i = i * operator for k, v in pairs(data) do local kop = type(k) == 'number' and k * operator if kop and kop <= i and (bestIndex == nil or kop > bestIndex * operator) then bestIndex = k end end if bestIndex then return data[bestIndex] else return nil end end
local function load(datamodule, frame) local args = frame.args local data = mw.loadData(datamodule) for i = 1, 20 do if args[i] then data = data[tonumber(args[i]) or args[i]] elseif args[i .. ' lteq'] then data = findItemRange(data, tonumber(args[i .. ' lteq']), 1) elseif args[i .. ' gteq'] then data = findItemRange(data, tonumber(args[i .. ' gteq']), -1) else break end end
if data == nil then return args['if_nil'] -- not a required argument, OK to return nil here. end
if type(data) == 'table' then -- Put the table into another table because the return value of loadData -- is a "fake" table that only has certain metamethods. local realdata = {} for k, v in pairs(data) do realdata[k] = v end data = realdata else data = { data } end
if args['template'] then return mw.text.unstripNoWiki(args['template']):format(unpack(data)) elseif args['preprocess'] then return frame:preprocess(mw.text.unstripNoWiki(args['preprocess']):format(unpack(data))) else return table.concat(data) end end
return setmetatable({}, { __index = function(t, k) return function(frame) return load('Module:' .. k, frame) end end })

local p = {}
-- Finds the next key key <= or >= the given i. -- operator is ±1 local function findItemRange(data, i, operator) local bestIndex = nil i = i * operator for k, v in pairs(data) do local kop = type(k) == 'number' and k * operator if kop and kop <= i and (bestIndex == nil or kop > bestIndex * operator) then bestIndex = k end end if bestIndex then return data[bestIndex] else return nil end end
local function load(datamodule, frame) local args = frame.args local data = mw.loadData(datamodule) for i = 1, 20 do if args[i] then data = data[tonumber(args[i]) or args[i]] elseif args[i .. ' lteq'] then data = findItemRange(data, tonumber(args[i .. ' lteq']), 1) elseif args[i .. ' gteq'] then data = findItemRange(data, tonumber(args[i .. ' gteq']), -1) else break end end
if data == nil then return args['if_nil'] -- not a required argument, OK to return nil here. end
if type(data) == 'table' then -- Put the table into another table because the return value of loadData -- is a "fake" table that only has certain metamethods. local realdata = {} for k, v in pairs(data) do realdata[k] = v end data = realdata else data = { data } end
if args['template'] then return mw.text.unstripNoWiki(args['template']):format(unpack(data)) elseif args['preprocess'] then return frame:preprocess(mw.text.unstripNoWiki(args['preprocess']):format(unpack(data))) else return table.concat(data) end end
return setmetatable({}, { __index = function(t, k) return function(frame) return load('Module:' .. k, frame) end end })
